## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between adjoe and GrowthX for content marketing and AI-driven growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [adjoe seeks to expand beyond mobile app developers into enterprise accounts, exploring ABM and outbound sales](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-enhanced content marketing, SEO, and audience conversion services](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [adjoe is interested in brand awareness for tier 2/3 accounts and AI-driven SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Potential next steps include a deeper discovery session and an 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

## Topics

### adjoe's Current Position and Goals

  - [B2B marketplace connecting advertisers (gaming studios) with mobile app developers](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Successful model: Users earn in-app currency/rewards for playing games](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Expanding into loyalty systems (e.g., GasBuddy partnership)](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Target ICPs: Heads of loyalty, heads of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Seeking to set up a repeatable outbound sales engine](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [6+ month sales cycles for enterprise accounts](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### GrowthX's Offerings and Approach

  - [Full-service growth agency specializing in content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Combines human expertise with AI/engineering for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Services: SEO, case studies, editorial content, audience building, conversion](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Tool-agnostic, adopting best-in-class solutions (e.g., OpenAI, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Example client: Webflow (developer awareness campaign)](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

### AI-Driven SEO and Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX offers AI mention tracking alongside traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Uses tools to monitor prompt presence, sentiment, and content citations](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Integrates AI insights to prioritize content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [adjoe currently uses AI mainly for research, not full content generation](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [adjoe's content team produces 2-5 pieces (blogs, case studies) per person/month](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Brand awareness campaigns for adjoe's tier 2 and tier 3 target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [AI-enhanced SEO optimization and content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Conversion of cold calls to warm leads through strategic content](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send customized proposal and case studies to adjoe](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Potential deeper discovery session to explore ideas and analyze competitors](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [If interested, schedule an 8-week paid strategy sprint to:](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
      - [Develop content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [Set up content production tooling](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [Create initial content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [Evaluate fit and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Vishnu to discuss internally and respond within a few days](https://fathom.video/share/weynU2sQsyca1vb4X-xRcsiWHTuztx6i?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
